source: Deterministic Architecture Audit and Repository Repair Plan for Brevio Repo

tasks.name: fix_outbox_dispatch_silent_drop
tasks.description: Fail DispatchOutboxEntryActivity when outboxDispatcher is nil instead of silently marking dispatched

tasks.name: fix_tool_execution_fabricated_success
tasks.description: Return Success=false when HandsExecutor is nil instead of fabricating success

tasks.name: create_remote_hands_executor
tasks.description: Implement HandsExecutor interface via HTTP calls to hands service

tasks.name: create_http_outbox_dispatcher
tasks.description: Implement OutboxDispatcher with SSRF protection and target allowlist

tasks.name: wire_deps_in_temporal_worker
tasks.description: Wire HandsExecutor and OutboxDispatcher into ActivityDeps

tasks.name: remove_hardcoded_hmac_key
tasks.description: Require HMAC_KEY in non-local environments, fail-fast if missing

tasks.name: harden_canvas_websocket_origin
tasks.description: Replace CheckOrigin allow-all with config-driven allowlist

tasks.name: harden_hands_key_provider
tasks.description: Replace zero-key InMemoryKeyProvider with env-based key material for non-local

tasks.name: validate_connector_seed_file
tasks.description: Reject placeholder unconfigured.local domains in non-local environments

tasks.name: implement_agents_service
tasks.description: Replace stub handlers with DB-backed CRUD and Temporal execution dispatch

tasks.name: implement_memorysvc_service
tasks.description: Replace stub handlers with real persistence via internal/memory and internal/rag

tasks.name: implement_router_service
tasks.description: Replace stub handlers with real model routing via internal/llm policies

tasks.name: implement_cron_service
tasks.description: Replace stub handlers with DB-backed job persistence and scheduling

tasks.name: implement_browser_service
tasks.description: Replace stub handlers with browser automation orchestration

tasks.name: implement_marketing_service
tasks.description: Replace stub handlers with DB-backed campaign and contact management

tasks.name: implement_otel_tracer_export
tasks.description: Wire real OTEL OTLP exporter when endpoint is configured

tasks.name: eliminate_todo_placeholders
tasks.description: Remove or implement TODO markers per audit policy

tasks.name: enforce_non_local_startup_requirements
tasks.description: Fail-fast when HANDS_BASE_URL or dispatcher config missing in non-local env

parallel_groups.reason: modify different files with no shared dependencies
independent service files with no shared dependencies

validation_gates.post_prompt_3: go build ./cmd/executor/... && go build ./internal/canvas/... && go build ./cmd/hands/...
validation_gates.final: go build ./... && go vet ./... && go test ./...
